title: Old not bad
description: Do you like the old versions? Then this mod is for you, a mod for you that adds old versions to new ones.
body:
**The "old not bad" mod Adds old versions to new ones.**
# Special items:
## icon 
is an object of two types. It can be a very old version or an outdated version. It appears when moving to a new dimension and disappears when the player leaves.

_picture:_

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c9d58232627ab93e32c935711691700aad4c05d.png)


## The weekend time cluster
was used to set fire to the portal in the old version

_pic:_

![cluster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f92dbb46ee9257762047b90141c31ab60560e20.png)

_portal:_

![portal 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d11b8ff07133745bef6042345678c1abd1ea58ee_0.webp)

_in portal:_

![in portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c985e42350d04b6a6b9dac6851730b5f1b8fe8d_0.webp)




## of the time cluster
This is the same as the weekend time cluster, but it was used to set fire to the portal in a very old version.

_pic:_

![very clystert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/585bbaff8fba5ed14b439cca64872b4696f696a0.png)

_portal:_

![in portal2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeb1fa24753f24ce7d11a3a51d1b3586a8193105_0.webp)

_in portal;_
![In](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aaec19ca599f266644703cd87e49abe2aa3c13b.jpeg)
## The Continuum Portal 
is an item for summoning a new boss, the space-time continuum. To summon it, you need to transfer the continuum portal to ground.


_pic:_

![continium portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57aafc75ae82527918ee23c61fca6b484c169366.png)

# Mobs:
## Steve
is just a mob that runs in a random direction.

_pic:_

![steve](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7297d012ba3573bfae0f7f2e2a35f61260295d6_0.webp)


# The space-time continuum 
is a new boss that gives you a new item, the Time Star

_pic:_

![continium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef5089bfd459f170571a4fdabb9de65ecf6d6cbd_0.webp)

# Professions of residents:

## temporary master
To get this profession, you need to set up a temporary master's Table From this resident, you can buy most of the items from the mod

_villager:_


![villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dd1bf0384c5fa59c789ff3541d6a892a8021d78_0.webp)

_shop:_

![shop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10ef1af1f99b86eca0495d71e8f4525d36b226eb_0.webp)



# Blocks for crafting:
## temporary master's Table
it is used for steaming objects: cobblestones, stones, grass


_crafts:_
![stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a2b6bc9b7b59e8d673089767379b012ecb23b87.png)

![grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0d95425ad26dc4c1f24b7f17cf23fdd16baf8cd.png)

![cobbeldstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fd96a9859584a3e2f5c5dd6a6551f62477de947.png)
